title: OTel Collector
description: Industry-standard monitoring dashboard for the OpenTelemetry Collector StatefulSet in otel-collector-prod-ns. Covers the full pipeline: Receiver -> Processor -> Exporter, plus resource utilization and Kubernetes infrastructure health. Designed for proactive degradation detection.

definition.content:
**OTel Collector v0.123.0** | StatefulSet: `otel-collector-prod-sts` (3 replicas) | Cluster: `divyam-prod-k8s-cluster`

Pipeline: **OTLP Receiver (gRPC)** -> **Memory Limiter + Batch Processor** -> **Kafka Exporters** (raw_logs, metering_logs)

**Degradation signals:** Rising queue size, increasing export failures, CPU/memory spikes, batch timeout triggers, refused records at receiver.
